parser_changes: locate_sections() Capstone detection fix: changed from first-match-then-delete approach to collect-all-then-filter. Previously, if 'Capstone' appeared as a bare SP row title (triggering the regex before AoS), the real Capstone section heading after AoS was never detected because the 'already found' guard prevented re-scanning. New implementation collects all Capstone line indices and takes the first one that appears after Areas of Study. Fixes MBAHA capstone detection. No regressions on any previously-validated guide.

guides.degree_title: Master of Business Administration, Healthcare Administration
guides.note: Previously parsed as MEDIUM due to Capstone detection bug. Re-parsed HIGH after locate_sections() fix.

sp_format: All 3 guides use 3-column multiline format (Course Description / CUs / Term).

capstone_notes.note: All 3 MBA family guides have a Capstone section with 2 competency bullets each. MBA family capstones use the full competency trigger block.

parser_bug_fixed.description: When a guide has a bare 'Capstone' row in the Standard Path table AND a real 'Capstone' section heading after Areas of Study, the old first-match-then-delete approach found the SP row first, set found['Capstone'], then deleted it — but never re-scanned for the real Capstone section. The new implementation collects all candidates and filters post-AoS.
guides_retroactively_corrected: MBAHA — re-parsed from MEDIUM to HIGH after fix
parser_bug_fixed.regression_verified: BSDA, BSMGT, BSCSIA, MBA all verified unchanged after fix

recommendation.summary: 3/3 parsed, 0 failures, 3 HIGH / 0 MEDIUM / 0 LOW. All 3 MBA guides parse cleanly with capstone detection correct after parser fix. No parser changes affecting previously-validated guides.
recommendation.next_family_rationale: healthcare_grad (2 guides: MHA and MPH) is the next low-risk target. These are the final members of the low-risk graduate tier. After healthcare_grad, the low-risk graduate families are complete and rollout should proceed to teaching_mat or education_bs (which share validated education_ba patterns).
